TextView.android:text:
Weekly Goals

1. Meal Prep
Plan and prepare your healthy meals for the week.

2. Stay Hydrated
Drink at least 2 liters of water every single day.

3. Daily Exercise
Complete 30 minutes of physical activity daily.

4. Better Sleep
Aim for 7-8 hours of quality sleep each night.

5. Reduce Sugar
Limit processed sweets and sugary drinks.

6. Morning Routine
Start each day with stretching or meditation.

7. Track Progress
Keep a journal of your meals and workouts.

8. Digital Detox
Reduce screen time an hour before going to bed.

9. Learn Something New
Read a few pages of a book or listen to a podcast.

10. Self-Reflection
Review your wins and areas to improve on Sunday.
